reviews.text: Our wedding photographer was incredible, she was so well organized and did a marvelous job with people and time management so that we got all the family combo pictures that we wanted.  He ideas showed that she is definitely an expert in her field.  I would recommend Shannon to any couple looking for a photographer that truly cares about your special day and capturing all those precious moments.   Just as a side note I also loved her energy,  she was enthusiastic without any type of ego.  She helped me as the bride to be calm and happy 😊

Elevate Photography was amazing! I really valued having an excellent photographer at our wedding and Elevate totally delivered. Our photographs turned out truly incredible! The style of the pictures was exactly what we discussed and we had so many final photographs given to us. From the beginning Elevate showed us that they would be a great choice. We were able to meet with our photographer before booking to ensure it was a good match (which it couldn’t have been better). Brittany, our photographer, then met with us multiple times before the wedding to make sure we were aligned. On the day of our wedding, Brittany was wonderful! She was so organized, took the lead like we had asked, and made everyone so comfortable. We had such a great time taking our more “staged” pictures and the candids were beautiful. She captured the warmth, joy, and feeling of our wedding day perfectly. Our final photographs will be forever cherished. I would highly recommend them.

We had the BEST time with Elevate Photography! We couldn’t have asked for a better experience and couldn't recommend them enough! From our engagement session to our wedding day, Bethany went above and beyond in every possible way.  She made us feel completely at ease in front of the camera and somehow managed to capture every genuine moment — the big emotions, the little details, and everything in between. Her assistant, Emily, was also wonderful to work with - she had great energy and was excited to be a part of our day!

The photos are absolutely stunning — timeless, full of life, and truly reflect us. Beyond the incredible images, it was Bethany's professionalism, warmth, and care that stood out most. As a company, Elevate is organized, flexible, and made the entire process feel effortless. Communication was seamless and
even our wedding party commented about how great it was to work with Bethany!

We’ll cherish these photos forever and can’t thank Bethany enough for helping us relive our favorite day so beautifully. If you’re looking for someone who not only takes breathtaking photos but genuinely cares about your story, Elevate Photography is the vendor to pick!

We worked with Emily from Elevate and we had an amazing experience! From the first moment we met Emily, we felt comfortable with her and knew she would do an amazing job. We loved that there were different packages offered and could add additional time or other extras. The instant sneak peak was a hit at our wedding!

During the engagement session, Emily was able to help us pick a perfect location and give us advice on how to pose. She knew we weren't comfortable in front of the camera and she was patient and guided us kindly. She also included in our dogs, which was a plus in our book!

To be honest, I was a little worried about working with a photographer who hadn't seen many Indian weddings but I should have known differently. Emily and her colleague Nate were present and captured all the important moments we wanted plus some! The family members all enjoyed working with Emily and Nate and my husband and I felt comfortable during the entire day. Emily constantly checked in with us and was just so wonderful to work with, I was extremely impressed and so glad that we chose her.

The attention to detail and the light and airy artistic style that Emily uses was exactly what we wanted and she captured our big day perfectly :)

We had the absolute best experience working with Kelsey from Elevate Photography! From start to finish, she was amazing. My husband and I both tend to feel awkward in front of the camera, but Kelsey made the entire process so easy and natural. She gave us clear direction while still making us feel like ourselves, and we honestly had so much fun during our photo sessions.
And the photos… WOW. They came out so beautiful! She captured every emotion, every little detail, and all the special moments in the most stunning way. We couldn’t be happier with how everything turned out.

If you're looking for a photographer who is not only talented but also down-to-earth, professional, and just a joy to be around—Kelsey is your person!
